questions.question: Explain the difference between Gaussian and Laplacian pyramids.
expectedPoints: Gaussian pyramid contains smoothed and subsampled versions of the image
Laplacian pyramid contains difference images between Gaussian levels
Gaussian pyramid is used for multi-scale representation

questions.question: Describe the wavelet decomposition process and its advantages for image compression.
expectedPoints: Wavelet transform decomposes images into frequency subbands
Four subbands: LL (approximation), LH (vertical), HL (horizontal), HH (diagonal)
Multi-level decomposition applied recursively to LL subband
Provides better energy compaction than Fourier-based methods
JPEG2000 uses wavelet transform for superior compression
